description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the ruby:2.3 Docker image and caches the vendor directory. Include a before_script that runs ruby -v, which ruby, installs bundler with gem install bundler --no-ri --no-rdoc, runs bundle install --jobs $(nproc) "${FLAGS[@]}" --path vendor, and sets the global git user email and name. Define an rspec job that executes bundle exec rspec -f d -c -b, and a rubocop job that executes bundle exec rubocop; both jobs inherit the before_script and run in the default stage.
